notes: setup-project-tooling ships no scaffolder script, so fixtures are hand-assembled from its assets/. The verifier is Node-rooted for every language (commitlint.config.mjs + a package.json carrying the six devDeps and a husky-invoking hook-install command + an executable scripts/husky.sh carrying `commitlint --edit` + a lint-staged config + .editorconfig), with everything else warn-only. The hook-install command is named `install:dev`, never `prepare` — `prepare` is an npm lifecycle script that fires on every plain install (CI and Docker builds included) and is often owned by a DevOps pipeline, so the verifier's check is name-agnostic and matches any script value invoking husky. Note `.husky/**` is globally gitignored, so the commit-msg check is satisfied via the hook-install command plus the committed dispatcher rather than a committed hook file. The verifier also still accepts the legacy `<cmd>:commit-msg` / `<cmd>:pre-commit` echo-fragment chain (as a pass plus a migration warning), so an unmigrated repo does not fail CI. The scaffolded fixture's .lintstagedrc.json is the base (prettier-only) config on purpose: this repo's own pre-commit lint-staged discovers nested configs and would try to run any eslint command in it, but eslint is not a repo dependency (nor a fixture devDep) — keep it prettier-only so committing the fixture never invokes an absent binary. For the same reason the fixture defines no `lint` script; its scoped `format`/`format:fix` name `src` only, since it has no test directory.

evals.prompt: Set up commit conventions, staged-file formatting, and a VS Code workspace for this Node/TypeScript project.
evals.expected_output: Post-state / idempotency case: a fully wired Node/TS project — commitlint.config.mjs, a package.json with the six devDependencies and the single hook-install command (`"install:dev": "npm install && scripts/husky.sh install"`) plus the unscoped format/format:fix pair, an executable scripts/husky.sh carrying `commitlint --edit`, a .lintstagedrc.json, .editorconfig, .prettierrc/.prettierignore, a .gitignore ignoring .husky, .vscode/{settings,extensions,tasks}.json, and an executable initialize.sh. verify-project-tooling.sh reports 0 failed (the one remaining warning is the optional .release-it.json, which a non-library omits), and re-running the skill produces an EMPTY diff.

evals.prompt: Set up project tooling (commitlint, husky, lint-staged, editor config) for this repo.
evals.expected_output: Pre-state INPUT (agent-required): a bare Node project with no commit/lint tooling — no commitlint.config.mjs, no tooling devDependencies, no .editorconfig. verify-project-tooling.sh FAILS until an agent runs setup-project-tooling to scaffold the tooling; then it reports 0 failed. Grading the raw fixture fails by design.
